examples: Objective: to provide anatomic basis for ortho-and antidromic puncture of popliteal artery and vein.
Objective To explore the curative effects of antidromic nasolacrimal expansion combined with artificial nasolacrimal canal stent implantation for chronic dacryocystitis.
Results showed that the afferent impulse discharges of sensory nerve ending increased when an antidromic electric stimulation was given to an adjacent sensory nerve ending.
